_comment: Public streaming endpoints used by stream-probe.mjs. Each entry is a direct media URL (not a page) so we can curl-through-proxy and assert on the response headers + first bytes — the browser path doesn't help here because Playwright headless doesn't click Play. Picked for longevity: Apple's bipbop HLS has been live for over a decade; Radio Paradise is one of the oldest public webradio streams; Mux maintains its test streams for library developers. Expected Content-Type values are listed so the probe can validate the classifier matches reality. minBytes is per-stream because HLS master manifests are tiny text files (a few hundred bytes) while audio/video streams flow tens of KB per second.
